description_long: This is a Ghostbusters-themed arcade game cabinet, featuring a classic upright design with a prominent control panel and a large display screen. The cabinet is predominantly black, adorned with the iconic Ghostbusters logo on the front and side, and has yellow hazard stripes on the lower front panel. The control panel is equipped with multiple buttons and joysticks, and the top marquee displays the 'GHOSTBUSTERS' title in bold white letters on a black background. The side of the cabinet features a detailed, molded replica of the Ghostbusters proton pack, adding a unique three-dimensional element. A power cord extends from the back, indicating its need for electrical connection.
description: A black Ghostbusters arcade game cabinet with a large display, detailed control panel, and themed artwork, including a 3D proton pack on the side.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the Ghostbusters logo, control panel with buttons and joysticks, and the marquee at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet and the attached 3D proton pack replica, with the power cord visible.
description_view_2: Right side view focusing on the detailed proton pack and the angled control panel.
description_view_3: Direct front view displaying the control panel layout, screen, and the 'GHOSTBUSTERS' marquee clearly.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a cluster, with hazard stripes and themed markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'GHOSTBUSTERS' title in bold white letters on a black background, matching the theme of the cabinet
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Ghostbusters logo and a detailed, molded proton pack replica with yellow and black caution stripes
